hero.title: The Breath of the Highlands
hero.subtitle: Rediscover absolute stillness on a windswept plateau, where traditional Rong-house architecture meets modern luxury.

heritage.label: Cultural Space
heritage.mainDesc: A refined blend of the Central Highlands' signature woven textiles and five-star comfort.
heritage.card1Desc: Inspired by the soaring roof of the traditional Rong communal house, every villa is a work of art honouring the heritage of the highlands.
heritage.card2Desc: Open the window to the sound of a waterfall and the endless green of the ancient forest.

experience.label: Evening Experience
experience.title: Warmth by the Fireplace
experience.desc: As night falls over the plateau, nothing beats sinking into a rattan chair, sipping hot tea and listening to firewood crackle by the outdoor stone hearth.

rooms.label: Where to Stay
rooms.title: Villas & Bungalows
rooms.subtitle: Every space tells its own story of Rong-house architecture and highland living.

items.name: Rong Single Bungalow
items.desc: A curved-roof timber bungalow inspired by the Rong house, overlooking endless coffee hills.

items.name: Family Twin Villa
items.desc: Two separate bedrooms, a private garden and an outdoor stone hearth for the whole family.

items.name: Waterfall Suite
items.desc: Uninterrupted waterfall views, an outdoor timber tub and a fully private balcony.

items.name: Communal Longhouse
items.desc: An authentically restored traditional longhouse, ideal for groups of friends and large families.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: Privileges at Rong Homestay
amenities.subtitle: Enjoy experiences steeped in the cultural identity of the Central Highlands.

testimonials.title: Guest Experiences
testimonials.subtitle: Honest stories from guests who have stayed at Rong Homestay.

items.quote: Unique Rong-house architecture and a peaceful setting deep in the mountains. Sitting by the fire listening to gong music at night was unforgettable.
items.name: Thu Ha

items.quote: Spotless rooms, a stunning waterfall view, and the staff happily arranged a coffee-hill tour for us. We'll definitely be back.
items.name: Quan Anh

items.quote: The perfect place to escape the city. The night sky was full of stars, the air was fresh, and the local breakfast was delicious.
items.name: Bao Tran
items.role: Traveller from Ho Chi Minh City

contact.label: Location
contact.title: The Heart of Kon Tum
contact.subtitle: Visit Rong Homestay to experience the authentic cultural space of the Central Highlands in person.
contact.address: Village 1, Dak Ro Wa Commune, Kon Tum City, Vietnam

footer.tagline: Rediscover the breath of the Central Highlands.
